description_long: This is a weathered, dark brown cowboy hat with a wide, irregular brim and a pronounced, pinched crown. The brim appears asymmetrical, with one side more upturned and the other more sloped, giving it a rugged, well-worn look. The crown is oval-shaped with a deep central crease and two side pinches, typical of classic cowboy hats. The surface shows a matte finish with visible scuffs and discoloration, suggesting extensive use or exposure to the elements. There are no visible decorative elements such as bands, feathers, or logos. The hat's material appears to be a stiff, possibly felted fabric or leather, contributing to its structured form.
description: A rugged, dark brown cowboy hat with a wide, uneven brim and a deeply creased, pinched crown. The surface is matte and weathered, lacking any visible decorations.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the oval, pinched crown and the wide, irregular brim with visible surface wear.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the pronounced upturn of the brim and the depth of the crown's crease.
description_view_2: Angled top view emphasizing the asymmetrical brim and the central crease of the crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the sloped brim and the overall thickness of the hat's material.
attribute_crown_shape: tall with a deep central crease and pinched front
